languages.text: Зарков пал последним. Преданные династии предателей до самого конца, зарковцы приняли гибель так же, как привыкли жить — с высоко поднятыми головами и с оружием в руках.

Zarkov was the last to fall. Loyal to the dynasty of traitors until the very end, the Zarkovians met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.
languages.original_text: Зарков пал последним. Преданные династии предателей до самого конца, зарковцы приняли гибель так же, как привыкли жить — с высоко поднятыми головами и с оружием в руках.

Zarkov was the last to fall. Loyal to the dynasty of traitors until the very end, the Zarkovians met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

languages.text: ザルコフは最後に陥落した。裏切り者の王朝に最後の最後まで忠誠を尽くし、ザルコフ人たちは生きてきたとおりに死を迎えた――頭を高く掲げ、その手に武器を握りしめて。
languages.original_text: Zarkov was the last to fall. Loyal to the dynasty of traitors until the very end, the Zarkovians met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: 32番メロー連隊はフォン・ヴァランシウス保護領と共に壊滅した。影から戻ってならず商人に仕えたザルコビアンたちは、誇り高く武器を手にしたまま、その生涯を歩んだように、死を迎えた。
ザルコフは最後に陥落した。裏切り者の王朝に最後の最後まで忠誠を尽くし、ザルコフ人たちは生きてきたとおりに死を迎えた――頭を高く掲げ、その手に武器を握りしめて。

languages.text: 扎尔科夫人战斗到了最后一刻。他们个个高昂着头颅，紧握着武器慷慨赴死，至死都忠于那个叛徒王朝。
languages.original_text: Zarkov was the last to fall. Loyal to the dynasty of traitors until the very end, the Zarkovians met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫人战斗到了最后一刻。他们个个高昂着头颅，紧握着武器慷慨赴死，至死都忠于那个叛徒王朝。

languages.text: Zarkov fut la dernière à tomber. Fidèles jusqu'au bout à la dynastie de traîtres, les Zarkoviens firent face à la mort comme ils avaient mené leur vie : la tête haute et l'arme à la main.
languages.original_text: Zarkov was the last to fall. Loyal to the dynasty of traitors until the very end, the Zarkovians met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov fut la dernière à tomber. Fidèles jusqu'au bout à la dynastie de traîtres, les Zarkoviens firent face à la mort comme ils avaient mené leur vie : la tête haute et l'arme à la main.

Le 32e régiment de Merov fut décimé avec le protectorat von Valancius. Les Zarkoviens, qui étaient sortis de l'obscurité pour servir {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}, firent face à la mort comme ils avaient mené leur vie : la tête haute et l'arme à la main.

languages.text: Zarkov fue el último en caer. Leales a la dinastía de traidores hasta el final, los zarkovianos se enfrentaron a la muerte tal y como habían vivido: con la cabeza bien alta y las armas en las manos.
languages.original_text: Zarkov was the last to fall. Loyal to the dynasty of traitors until the very end, the Zarkovians met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov fue el último en caer. Leales a la dinastía de traidores hasta el final, los zarkovianos se enfrentaron a la muerte tal y como habían vivido: con la cabeza bien alta y las armas en las manos.

languages.text: Son düşen Zarkov oldu. Sonuna kadar hain hanedanlığına sadık kalan Zarkovlular, ölümlerini tıpkı hayatlarını yaşadıkları gibi karşıladı: Başları dik ve silahları ellerinde.
languages.original_text: Zarkov was the last to fall. Loyal to the dynasty of traitors until the very end, the Zarkovians met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: Son düşen Zarkov oldu. Sonuna kadar hain hanedanlığına sadık kalan Zarkovlular, ölümlerini tıpkı hayatlarını yaşadıkları gibi karşıladı: Başları dik ve silahları ellerinde.

languages.text: Zarkov fiel als Letzter. Die Zarkovianer dienten der Dynastie von Verrätern bis zuletzt, ehe sie starben wie sie gelebt hatten ... erhobenen Hauptes und mit gezogener Waffe.
languages.original_text: Zarkov was the last to fall. Loyal to the dynasty of traitors until the very end, the Zarkovians met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.
